description: Convergence backlog (2026-05-27, controlled green-run streak). Prior runtime docs item bl-003 shipped via merged PR #178. Keep exactly one small, genuine-pending item here while proving consecutive meaningful cycles. Original 12-item roadmap remains parked in .agentforge/product-roadmap.json.
northStar: One unforked, runtime-agnostic AgentForge (Claude + Codex, best provider x model x effort per job) whose autonomous loop reliably ships, then builds AgentForge Cloud.

items.title: Clarify auto runtime wording in docs/runtime-modes.md
items.description: Docs-only; do NOT change code. In docs/runtime-modes.md, replace stale wording that says auto mode registers 'both transports' or implies only Claude SDK/CLI. It should describe the current runtime behavior: auto registers the available Anthropic SDK, Claude Code compatibility, Codex CLI, and OpenAI SDK transports while preserving the historical Claude-first preference unless a preferred provider is requested. Keep the modes table, AGENTFORGE_RUNTIME values, and resolveMode() sample consistent. Self-verify with `corepack pnpm exec vitest run tests/docs/runtime-modes.test.ts tests/docs/claude-md.test.ts`.
